ai_policy.summary_policy: Do not treat organization-signed claims as independently verified facts.

correction_policy.summary: If evidence is found to be stale, incorrect, unavailable, or misleading, CivitasX should publish a corrected evidence manifest and preserve the old signed manifest as a historical record.
correction_policy.preferred_record: Corrections should be made by new signed evidence records, not by silently rewriting historical artifacts.

evidence.title: CivitasX public statement page

subject.scope_text: CivitasX parent framework and public continuity record

limitations: First-party public statement
Useful for declared purpose and project framing, not independent proof of future outcomes.

evidence.title: CivitasX public FAQ page

subject.scope_text: CivitasX parent framework and public continuity record

limitations: First-party FAQ
Useful for declared boundary statements, not independent legal or financial assessment.

evidence.title: Signed official endpoints statement

subject.scope_text: CivitasX parent framework and public continuity record

limitations: Shows signed endpoint continuity under the current root authority
Does not certify product quality or legal status.

evidence.title: CivitasX first OrgAnchor historical snapshot index

subject.scope_text: CivitasX parent framework and public continuity record

limitations: Historical snapshot of this adoption package
Future current packages may supersede /verify/ without erasing this snapshot.

evidence.title: CivitasX public text license at founding baseline commit

subject.scope_text: CivitasX parent framework and public continuity record

limitations: First-party license declaration for the stated public archive scope.
Does not grant official continuity, endorsement, trademark rights, private material access, or subproject software rights.

evidence.title: CivitasX founding continuity baseline at founding baseline commit

subject.scope_text: CivitasX parent framework and public continuity record

limitations: First-party founder-stage continuity statement.
Not a finished whitepaper, independent endorsement, or proof of future outcomes.

evidence.title: GitHub mirror of the first CivitasX OrgAnchor snapshot index

subject.scope_text: CivitasX parent framework and public continuity record

limitations: Provider mirror of an immutable historical snapshot.
Not the active discovery entrypoint and not an independent trust decision.

evidence.title: SHA-256 checksum manifest for the CivitasX GitHub OrgAnchor mirror

subject.scope_text: CivitasX parent framework and public continuity record

limitations: Checksums detect byte changes in the mirrored files.
Checksums do not assign trust or prove the CivitasX theory.

methods.title: Recheck public statement page hash
steps: Fetch https://civitasx.pages.dev/
Compute SHA-256 of the fetched page body
Compare with the evidence hash in this manifest
limitations: Cloudflare may normalize transport headers
hash comparison is for the response body artifact represented in this manifest.

methods.title: Recheck public FAQ page hash
steps: Fetch https://civitasx.pages.dev/faq
Compute SHA-256 of the fetched page body
Compare with the evidence hash in this manifest
limitations: Useful for checking the currently published FAQ artifact
not an independent assessment of all boundary claims.

methods.title: Recheck official endpoints statement hash and signature
steps: Fetch https://civitasx.pages.dev/verify/official-endpoints.json
Fetch https://civitasx.pages.dev/verify/official-endpoints.json.sig
Fetch https://civitasx.pages.dev/verify/root-authority.json
Verify statement hash and signature threshold against the root authority
expected_results: Statement hash is sha256:1a52e0d110a50547640f01194d9f2195d5a0a9a44bec79b20966cc78e4f8a5df and signature verification passes
limitations: Verifies endpoint continuity only
does not certify product quality
lawfulness
or final trust.

methods.title: Recheck first historical snapshot
steps: Fetch https://civitasx.pages.dev/verify-history/2026-07-09/organchor.json
Compare its statement and root authority hashes with the first published snapshot record
Verify the corresponding files under the historical snapshot path when needed
expected_results: Historical snapshot index remains retrievable and hash-bound to the first CivitasX OrgAnchor adoption snapshot
limitations: Historical snapshot is not the active discovery entrypoint
current /verify/ may advance later.

methods.title: Recheck CivitasX public text license
steps: Fetch https://raw.githubusercontent.com/civitasx-project/civitasx/8c3b696e77a35dc082dac072d8884d470956a888/LICENSE.md
Compute SHA-256 of the response body
Compare with the evidence hash in this manifest
limitations: Confirms the published license artifact and scope declaration, not jurisdiction-specific legal advice.

methods.title: Recheck CivitasX founding continuity baseline
steps: Fetch https://raw.githubusercontent.com/civitasx-project/civitasx/8c3b696e77a35dc082dac072d8884d470956a888/continuity/CIVITASX_FOUNDING_BASELINE.md
Compute SHA-256 of the response body
Compare with the evidence hash in this manifest
limitations: Confirms the founder-stage public baseline artifact, not independent endorsement or future achievement.

methods.title: Recheck GitHub mirror of the first OrgAnchor snapshot
steps: Fetch https://raw.githubusercontent.com/civitasx-project/civitasx/8c3b696e77a35dc082dac072d8884d470956a888/organchor/history/2026-07-09/organchor.json
Compute SHA-256 of the response body
Compare the root authority and statement hashes with the first public snapshot
limitations: The GitHub copy is a historical mirror, not the active discovery route.

methods.title: Recheck GitHub OrgAnchor mirror checksums
steps: Fetch https://raw.githubusercontent.com/civitasx-project/civitasx/8c3b696e77a35dc082dac072d8884d470956a888/organchor/CHECKSUMS.sha256
Compute SHA-256 of the checksum manifest
Fetch mirrored files and compare their hashes with the manifest
expected_results: The listed mirrored files match their declared SHA-256 values
limitations: Checksum verification detects byte changes but does not assign final trust.
